feature_nova_bot_enabled.description: Show Nova Bot chat widget on vendor/location selection

feature_phone_auth_enabled.description: Enable phone number collection during sign-up

feature_credits_topup_enabled.description: Show credits top-up UI for customers

min_top_up_amount.description: Minimum credit top-up amount in EGP

defaultValue.value: Cancellations made more than 24 hours before the booking start time receive a full refund in NovaSpace credits. Cancellations within 24 hours are non-refundable. No-shows forfeit the full booking amount.

default_cancellation_policy_text.description: Default cancellation policy shown when a vendor/location has none set

owner_passcode.description: Owner master passcode (overrides Secret Manager when non-empty). Leave empty to use OWNER_PASSCODE secret.
